game_name: Dune II: The Building of a Dynasty

sub_pixel_system.notes: Not applicable - strategy game with no player character movement

special_mechanics.name: Unit Movement
special_mechanics.description: Real-time strategy game where player controls multiple units and structures. No direct player character movement.

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Units
special_mechanics.description: Harvester vehicles collect spice; military units traverse terrain including sand dunes and rocky terrain

special_mechanics.name: Sandworm Hazard
special_mechanics.description: Environmental threat that can swallow vehicles and infantry whole but is blocked by rocky terrain

special_mechanics.name: Spice Bloom Detonation
special_mechanics.description: Concealed spice creates explosion when shot at or run over; unit running over it is destroyed

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Dune II is a real-time strategy game without a playable character. It does not contain traditional platformer or action game physics parameters (jump, gravity, acceleration, etc.). Movement data is not applicable to this game paradigm. All player-related physics values are null as they are not relevant to the RTS gameplay.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Dune II article (confirms strategy game genre, platform, year, developer)
